'''sholanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:labiopalatine|labiopalatine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:labiopalatine|labiopalatine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| sholanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholanithi|sholanithi]] || [[word:sholaniji|sholaniji]] || [[word:sholanishi|sholanishi]] || [[word:sholaniki|sholaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholanuthuthu|sholanuthuthu]] || [[word:sholanujuju|sholanujuju]] || [[word:sholanushushu|sholanushushu]] || [[word:sholanukuku|sholanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholanuthu|sholanuthu]] || [[word:sholanuju|sholanuju]] || [[word:sholanushu|sholanushu]] || [[word:sholanuku|sholanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholanufthuf|sholanufthuf]] || [[word:sholanufjuf|sholanufjuf]] || [[word:sholanufshuf|sholanufshuf]] || [[word:sholanufkuf|sholanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholanethe|sholanethe]] || [[word:sholaneje|sholaneje]] || [[word:sholaneshe|sholaneshe]] || [[word:sholaneke|sholaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholanothotho|sholanothotho]] || [[word:sholanojojo|sholanojojo]] || [[word:sholanoshosho|sholanoshosho]] || [[word:sholanokoko|sholanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholanotho|sholanotho]] || [[word:sholanojo|sholanojo]] || [[word:sholanosho|sholanosho]] || [[word:sholanoko|sholanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholanofthof|sholanofthof]] || [[word:sholanofjof|sholanofjof]] || [[word:sholanofshof|sholanofshof]] || [[word:sholanofkof|sholanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholanïfthïf|sholanïfthïf]] || [[word:sholanïfjïf|sholanïfjïf]] || [[word:sholanïfshïf|sholanïfshïf]] || [[word:sholanïfkïf|sholanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholanïfthïfthïf|sholanïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:sholanïfjïfjïf|sholanïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:sholanïfshïfshïf|sholanïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:sholanïfkïfkïf|sholanïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholanïfthïf|sholanïfthïf]] || [[word:sholanïfjïf|sholanïfjïf]] || [[word:sholanïfshïf|sholanïfshïf]] || [[word:sholanïfkïf|sholanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholanïfthïf|sholanïfthïf]] || [[word:sholanïfjïf|sholanïfjïf]] || [[word:sholanïfshïf|sholanïfshïf]] || [[word:sholanïfkïf|sholanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sholanæthæ|sholanæthæ]] || [[word:sholanæjæ|sholanæjæ]] || [[word:sholanæshæ|sholanæshæ]] || [[word:sholanækæ|sholanækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:sholanathatha|sholanathatha]] || [[word:sholanajaja|sholanajaja]] || [[word:sholanashasha|sholanashasha]] || [[word:sholanakaka|sholanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:sholanatha|sholanatha]] || [[word:sholanaja|sholanaja]] || [[word:sholanasha|sholanasha]] || [[word:sholanaka|sholanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:sholanafthaf|sholanafthaf]] || [[word:sholanafjaf|sholanafjaf]] || [[word:sholanafshaf|sholanafshaf]] || [[word:sholanafkaf|sholanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:sholanasha|sholanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:sholanshësha|sholanshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sholanrosha|sholanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sholanmusha|sholanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:sholanyasha|sholanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosholankshësha|gosholankshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosholankrosha|gosholankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosholankmusha|gosholankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosholankyasha|gosholankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:sholalanasha|sholalanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sholalanshësha|sholalanshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sholalanrosha|sholalanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sholalanmusha|sholalanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sholalanyasha|sholalanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosholalankshësha|gosholalankshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosholalankrosha|gosholalankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosholalankmusha|gosholalankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosholalankyasha|gosholalankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:shelænasha|shelænasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:shelænshësha|shelænshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shelænrosha|shelænrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shelænmusha|shelænmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:shelænyasha|shelænyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshelænkshësha|goshelænkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshelænkrosha|goshelænkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshelænkmusha|goshelænkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goshelænkyasha|goshelænkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:sholfanasha|sholfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:sholfanshësha|sholfanshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sholfanrosha|sholfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sholfanmusha|sholfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:sholfanyasha|sholfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosholfankshësha|gosholfankshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosholfankrosha|gosholfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosholfankmusha|gosholfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gosholfankyasha|gosholfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
